creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 229556
Patch to update audio/muse-sequencer to 4.0.0

Although I'm still not using MusE regularly, I did an update to the current 4.0.0 release to check its progress.

The patch attached builds fine for me on FreeBSD 13.0 and from my limited testing everything seems to works ok. There were some changes to the release packaging and the directory structure, no difficulties apart from that.
